subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Proposed rollout skips mandatory 48-hour staging validation (POL-601) and lacks evidence of change board approval and monitoring setup (POL-602). Rollback and traffic monitoring strategy (POL-603) is not specified and must be reviewed.
applied_constraints: Complete minimum 48-hour staging validation before production rollout
Obtain change board approval and configure post-deployment monitoring
Document automated rollback capability and traffic monitoring strategy
